ab: ninku ka’ali’an mu i Masaw tu ngadan, intaw mu mawu tu alrak za Pinuyumayan.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Masaw，他也是卑南族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Masaw, and he is also an Pinuyuma child.

ab: salrangan mi kazu kana zekalr i Katratripulr temakesi
ch: 我們一起在知本部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Katratripulr tribe.

ab: marayas mi salrangan kingekinger kana dawdawanan mararengay kana umaumalren, iniyam mu sayhu mi marengay kana ngai na Pinuyumayan.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說卑南語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Pinuyumayan proficiently.

ab: inku mu atras ku zi semever ku, i Masaw mu alusu zi varivariw
ch: 我很高也很胖，Masaw很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Masaw is short and thin.

ab: i Masaw salaw dalikedik sahar a trau papiya kanintaw.
ch: Masaw很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Masaw is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
